subject: (no subject)
body:
attached is a first draft, tell me what changes additions or modifications you suggest. I am happy you are returning so fast. If Mohammed really wants to see the future, after seeing the past in Washington with Obama, we should take him to see the Laboratory at MIT. advanced robotics. Artificial Intelligence etc.

--
